title: Current Data Pages
text:
Satellite sea surface temperature and chlorophyll-a in the Northeast Pacific


Satellite chlorophyll-a and SST of Marine Protected Areas and regions of interest on the BC coast.












Marine heatwave monitoring of the Northeast Pacific Ocean


Satellite SST maps, anomalies, and buoy time series of surface temperature in the Northeast Pacific for tracking marine heatwaves.












Line P dissolved oxygen monitoring


Dissolved oxygen plots from stations of the Line P long-term monitoring program.












BC lightstation sea-surface temperature


Observational data, trends and climatologies of ocean temperature measured at B.C. Lightstations. Daily observations extend as far back as 1914.












Ocean Sciences Division mooring data


Time series of temperature and salinity from mooring stations on the west coast of British Columbia.












Deep water properties of BC inlets


Deep water properties, physical descriptions, and monitoring data for major inlets of British Columbia from the Water Properties database, CIOOS Pacific and the Hakai Institute. Summaries include monthly and annual statistics and time series of samples back to the 1930’s.





No matching items
 Back to top

title: Data and Publications
text:
A great deal of our work is data correction and upload for the Water Properties Database. Much more information, data, and program details can be found on the Water Properties website (login required). The data archive can be searched accessed at this link.

Code and packages
A number of processing packages are currently under development, and will be shared here as they come available:

ios-shell, a python package to easily read and parse files found in the Water Properties database (“IOS shell” format).
oceancolouR, an R package with useful functions for processing and analysis of satellite ocean colour remote sensing data.
We also contribute code to the pacea R package, which includes many more Pacific datasets for ecosystem monitoring and fisheries management🐟

Datasets
A few of the layers we have published are listed below. Some of the datasets listed here can also be found in the Canada Marine Planning Atlas, and the Salish Sea Initiative.

Climatology layers:

Satellite chlorophyll-a concentration monthly climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 2003-2020 (1 km and 4km spatial resolution, MODIS-Aqua)
Satellite sea surface temperature monthly climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 2003-2020 (1 km, MODIS-Aqua)
Satellite sea surface temperature monthly climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 1981-2010 (4 km, AVHRR)
Satellite sea surface temperature monthly climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 1990-2020 (4 km, AVHRR)
In situ temperature, Salinity and Sigma-t seasonal slimatologies of the Northeast Pacific Ocean, 1980-2010
In situ temperature, Salinity and Sigma-t seasonal climatologies of the Canadian Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 1980-2010



Long-term monitoring data:

British Columbia Lightstation Sea-Surface Temperature and Salinity Data (Pacific), 1914-present
